reference: LEVIN DID NOT IN THE LEAST UNDERSTAND WHAT WAS THE MATTER AND HE MARVELED AT THE PASSION WITH WHICH IT WAS DISPUTED WHETHER OR NOT THE DECISION ABOUT FLEROV SHOULD BE PUT TO THE VOTE
text: lewin did not in the least understand what was the matter and he marvelled at the passion with which it was disputed whether or not the decision about fleiroff should be put to the vote
